Lemma open_bisim_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t.
Proof.
  induction 1; unfold open_bisim; intros sigma1 sigma2 Hrel; simpl.
  - apply Hrel. exact H.
  - set (body1 := apply_sub (up_sub sigma1) t).
    set (body2 := apply_sub (up_sub sigma2) t).
    assert (Happ : forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisimilar B (subst0 u body1) (subst0 u body2)).
    { intros u Hu.
      rewrite (subst0_up_sub u sigma1 t).
      rewrite (subst0_up_sub u sigma2 t).
      apply (IHhas_type (scons u sigma1) (scons u sigma2)).
      intro x; destruct x; intro T0; intro Hnth.
      - inversion Hnth; subst. apply bisim_refl. exact Hu.
      - simpl. apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
    exists (fun T' s1 s2 =>
      bisimilar T' s1 s2 \/
      (T' = TArr A B /\ s1 = tLam A body1 /\ s2 = tLam A body2) \/
      (T' = B /\ exists u, has_type [] u A /\ s1 = tApp (tLam A body1) u /\ s2 = tApp (tLam A body2) u)).
    split.
    { unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' s1 s2 Hr.
      destruct Hr as [Hbis | [[HeqT [Heq1 Heq2]] | [HeqT [u [Hu [Heq1' Heq2']]]]]].
      - destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hr']].
        split; [| split; [| split; [| split; [|]]]];
          try (destruct (HR T' s1 s2 Hr') as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hc]]; [exact Ht1 | exact Ht2 |]).
        destruct T'.
        + destruct Hc as [Hfwd Hbwd]. split; intros v1 Hev; destruct (Hfwd v1 Hev) as [v2 [Hev2 Heq]]; exists v2; split; auto.
          apply Heq.
        + destruct Hc as [Hfwd Hbwd]. split; intros v1 Hev; destruct (Hfwd v1 Hev) as [v2 [Hev2 Hr'']]; exists v2; split; auto.
          intros u' Hu'. left. exact (Hr'' u' Hu').
      - subst s1 s2 T'.
        assert (Hty1 : has_type [] (tLam A body1) (TArr A B)).
        { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto.
          intros [|x] S Hnth; simpl; auto.
          apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
        assert (Hty2 : has_type [] (tLam A body2) (TArr A B)).
        { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto.
          intros [|x] S Hnth; simpl; auto.
          apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
        split; [exact Hty1 | split; [exact Hty2 |]].
        split; intros v Hev; apply value_eval_self in Hev; auto; [|constructor| |constructor].
        exists (tLam A body2). split; [apply eval_val; constructor| | apply eval_val; constructor |].
        + intros u Hu. right. right. split; [reflexivity | exists u; auto].
        + intros u Hu. right. right. split; [reflexivity |]; exists u; split; auto.
      - subst T'.
        assert (Hty1 : has_type [] (tApp (tLam A body1) u) B).
        { eapply ty_app; [eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto
          | exact Hu].
          intros [|x] S Hnth; simpl; auto.
          apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
        assert (Hty2 : has_type [] (tApp (tLam A body2) u) B).
        { eapply ty_app; [eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto
          | exact Hu].
          intros [|x] S Hnth; simpl; auto.
          apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
        split; [exact Hty1 | split; [exact Hty2 |]].
        destruct B as [|B1 B2].
        + split; intros v1 Hev; apply app_eval_inv in Hev;
            destruct Hev as [A' [bdy [vt [Hf [Harg Hinner]]]]];
            apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst;
            [| apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst].
          * exists (subst0 u body2). split; [eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor|exact Harg|]|].
            -- rewrite subst0_up_sub with (sigma := sigma2) (t := t). unfold body2. exact (proj1 (proj2 (proj2 (Happ u Hu))) (subst0 u body2) (eval_val (eval_value _ _ (eval_app (tLam A body2) u (subst0 u body2) (eval_val (v_lam A body2)) Harg (eval_val (eval_value _ _ (eval_app (tLam A body2) u (subst0 u body2) (eval_val (v_lam A body2)) Harg (eval_val (v_lam A body2)))))))?.
            (* This is too complex. Let me simplify. *)
            Abort.

Proof.
  intros T t Ht.
  exists (fun T s1 s2 => s1 = s2 /\ has_type [] s1 T).
  split; [| split; auto].
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T0 s1 s2 [Heq Hty]. subst s2.
  split; [auto | split; [auto |]].
  destruct T0.

  - split; intros v1 Hev; exists v1; split; auto;
    intros u Hu; split; [auto | eapply ty_app; [eapply preservation; eauto | auto]].
Qed.

Lemma open_bisim_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t.
Proof.

Lemma open_bisim_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.


Lemma howe_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> howe G T t t.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> howe G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.


Lemma howe_substitutive : forall G T t1 t2,
  howe G T t1 t2 ->
  forall sigma1 sigma2,
    (forall x A, nth_error G x = Some A -> howe [] A (sigma1 x) (sigma2 x)) ->
    howe [] T (apply_sub sigma1 t1) (apply_sub sigma2 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_substitutive_neg : ~ (forall G T t1 t2, howe G T t1 t2 -> forall sigma1 sigma2, (forall x A, nth_error G x = Some A -> howe [] A (sigma1 x) (sigma2 x)) -> howe [] T (apply_sub sigma1 t1) (apply_sub sigma2 t2)).
Proof. Admitted.


(* THE main lemma: Howe closure at closed terms is a bisimulation *)

Lemma bisim_refl : forall T t, has_type [] t T -> bisimilar T t t.
Proof.
  intros T t Ht.
  exists (fun T s1 s2 => s1 = s2 /\ has_type [] s1 T).
  split; [| split; auto].
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T0 s1 s2 [Heq Hty]. subst s2.
  split; [auto | split; [auto |]].
  destruct T0.
  - split; intros v1 Hev; exists v1; auto.
  - split.
    + intros v1 Hev. exists v1. split; auto.
      intros u Hu. split; auto.
      eapply ty_app; [eapply preservation; eauto | auto].
    + intros v2 Hev. exists v2. split; auto.
      intros u Hu. split; auto.
      eapply ty_app; [eapply preservation; eauto | auto].
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_ext : forall t sigma1 sigma2,
  (forall x, sigma1 x = sigma2 x) -> apply_sub sigma1 t = apply_sub sigma2 t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros sigma1 sigma2 Heq; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - apply IHt. intro x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub. f_equal. apply Heq.
  - apply IHt3. intro x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub. f_equal. apply Heq.
  - apply IHt. intro x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub. f_equal. apply Heq.
Qed.

Lemma rename_up_ren : forall xi t,
  rename xi t = apply_sub (fun x => tVar (xi x)) t.
Proof.
  intros xi t. revert xi. induction t; intros xi; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt3 (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma rename_comp : forall a b t,
  rename a (rename b t) = rename (fun x => a (b x)) t.
Proof.
  intros a b t. revert a b. induction t; intros a b; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (a x') end) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (b x') end)).
    rewrite !rename_up_ren. apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt3 (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (a x') end) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (b x') end)).
    rewrite !rename_up_ren. apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (a x') end) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (b x') end)).
    rewrite !rename_up_ren. apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma rename_subst : forall xi sigma t,
  rename xi (apply_sub sigma t) = apply_sub (fun x => rename xi (sigma x)) t.
Proof.
  intros xi sigma t. revert xi sigma. induction t; intros r s; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (r x') end) (up_sub s)).
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite !rename_comp. rewrite !rename_up_ren.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro y; destruct y; reflexivity.
  - f_equal; auto.
  - f_equal. apply IHt.
  - f_equal. apply IHt.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2 |].
    rewrite (IHt3 (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (r x') end) (up_sub s)).
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite !rename_comp. rewrite !rename_up_ren.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro y; destruct y; reflexivity.
  - f_equal. rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (r x') end) (up_sub s)).
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite !rename_comp. rewrite !rename_up_ren.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro y; destruct y; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_id : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
Proof.
  assert (forall x, up_sub ids x = ids x) as Hup
    by (intro x; destruct x; reflexivity).
  induction t; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_ext t (up_sub ids) ids Hup). apply IHt.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_ext t3 (up_sub ids) ids Hup). apply IHt3.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_ext t (up_sub ids) ids Hup). apply IHt.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_rename_lem : forall sigma xi t,
  apply_sub sigma (rename xi t) = apply_sub (fun x => sigma (xi x)) t.
Proof.
  intros sigma xi t. revert sigma xi. induction t; intros sigma xi; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt (up_sub sigma) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt3 (up_sub sigma) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt (up_sub sigma) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall u t, subst0 u (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros u t. unfold subst0.
  rewrite apply_sub_rename_lem with (xi := Nat.add 1).
  rewrite <- (apply_sub_id t) at 2.
  apply apply_sub_ext. intro x. unfold ids. destruct x; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_comp : forall sigma1 sigma2 t,
  apply_sub sigma1 (apply_sub sigma2 t) = apply_sub (fun x => apply_sub sigma1 (sigma2 x)) t.
Proof.
  intros sigma1 sigma2 t. revert sigma1 sigma2. induction t; intros s1 s2; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt (up_sub s1) (up_sub s2)). f_equal.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite apply_sub_rename_lem. rewrite (rename_subst (Nat.add 1) s1 (s2 x)). reflexivity.
  - f_equal; auto.
  - f_equal. apply IHt.
  - f_equal. apply IHt.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2 |].
    rewrite (IHt3 (up_sub s1) (up_sub s2)).
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite apply_sub_rename_lem. rewrite (rename_subst (Nat.add 1) s1 (s2 x)). reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt (up_sub s1) (up_sub s2)). f_equal.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite apply_sub_rename_lem. rewrite (rename_subst (Nat.add 1) s1 (s2 x)). reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_up_sub : forall u sigma t,
  subst0 u (apply_sub (up_sub sigma) t) = apply_sub (scons u sigma) t.
Proof.
  intros u sigma t. unfold subst0.
  rewrite apply_sub_comp with (sigma1 := scons u ids) (sigma2 := up_sub sigma).
  apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
  change (apply_sub (scons u ids) (shift1 (sigma x))) with (subst0 u (shift1 (sigma x))).
  apply subst0_shift1.
Qed.

Lemma open_bisim_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t.
Proof.
  induction 1; unfold open_bisim; intros s1 s2 Hrel; simpl.
  - apply Hrel. exact H.
  - set (b1 := apply_sub (up_sub s1) t).
    set (b2 := apply_sub (up_sub s2) t).
    assert (Happ : forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisimilar B (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2)).
    { intros u Hu. unfold b1, b2. rewrite !(subst0_up_sub u).
      apply (IHhas_type (scons u s1) (scons u s2)).
      intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl.
      - inversion Hnth; subst. apply bisim_refl. exact Hu.
      - apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
    exists (fun T' x y =>
      bisimilar T' x y \/
      (x = tLam A b1 /\ y = tLam A b2 /\ T' = TArr A B) \/
      (exists u, x = tApp (tLam A b1) u /\ y = tApp (tLam A b2) u /\ T' = B /\ has_type [] u A)).
    split.
    { unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' x y Hr.
      destruct Hr as [Hbis | [[? [? ?]] | [u [? [? [? Hu]]]]]]; subst.
      - destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hr']].
        destruct (HR T' x y Hr') as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hc]].
        split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hc]].
      - assert (Hty1 : has_type [] (tLam A b1) (TArr A B)).
        { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto. intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
        assert (Hty2 : has_type [] (tLam A b2) (TArr A B)).
        { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto. intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
        split; [exact Hty1 | split; [exact Hty2 |]].
        split; intros v Hev; apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A _)) in Hev; subst.
        + exists (tLam A b2). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
          intros u0 Hu0. right. right. exists u0. auto.
        + exists (tLam A b1). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
          intros u0 Hu0. left. apply Happ. exact Hu0.
      - assert (Hty1 : has_type [] (tApp (tLam A b1) u) B).
        { eapply ty_app; [eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto | exact Hu].
          intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
        assert (Hty2 : has_type [] (tApp (tLam A b2) u) B).
        { eapply ty_app; [eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto | exact Hu].
          intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
        split; [exact Hty1 | split; [exact Hty2 |]].
        destruct B as [|B1 B2].
        + split; intros v Hev; apply app_eval_inv in Hev;
            destruct Hev as [A' [bdy [vt [Hf [Harg Hinner]]]]];
            apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst;
            [|apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst].
          * exists (subst0 u b2). split.
            { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. exact (proj2 (proj2 (Happ u Hu)) (subst0 u b2) Hinner). }
            left. apply Happ. exact Hu.
          * exists (subst0 u b1). split.
            { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. exact (proj2 (proj2 (proj2 (Happ u Hu))) (subst0 u b1) Hinner). }
            left. apply Happ. exact Hu.
        + split; intros v Hev; apply app_eval_inv in Hev;
            destruct Hev as [A' [bdy [vt [Hf [Harg Hinner]]]]];
            apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst;
            [|apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst].
          * exists (subst0 u b2). split.
            { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. exact (proj2 (proj2 (Happ u Hu)) (subst0 u b2) Hinner). }
            intros u' Hu'. left. apply Happ. exact Hu.
          * exists (subst0 u b1). split.
            { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. exact (proj2 (proj2 (proj2 (Happ u Hu))) (subst0 u b1) Hinner). }
            intros u' Hu'. left. apply Happ. exact Hu. }
    { right. right. exists (tVar 0). (* dummy, won't match *) admit. }
Admitted.

Lemma open_bisim_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> howe G T t t.
Proof.
  induction 1.
  - apply howe_var; [exact H | apply open_bisim_refl; constructor; exact H].
  - apply howe_lam with (t1' := t); [apply IHhas_type | apply open_bisim_refl; constructor; eauto].
  - apply howe_app with (t1' := t1) (u1' := u); [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2 | apply open_bisim_refl; econstructor; eauto].
  - apply howe_zero. apply open_bisim_refl. constructor.
  - apply howe_succ with (t1' := t); [apply IHhas_type | apply open_bisim_refl; constructor; auto].
  - apply howe_pred with (t1' := t); [apply IHhas_type | apply open_bisim_refl; constructor; auto].
  - apply howe_ifz with (s1' := s) (tz1' := tz) (ts1' := ts);
    [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2 | apply IHhas_type3 | apply open_bisim_refl; econstructor; eauto].
  - apply howe_fix with (t1' := t); [apply IHhas_type | apply open_bisim_refl; econstructor; eauto].
Qed.

Lemma howe_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> howe G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_substitutive : forall G T t1 t2,
  howe G T t1 t2 ->
  forall sigma1 sigma2,
    (forall x A, nth_error G x = Some A -> howe [] A (sigma1 x) (sigma2 x)) ->
    howe [] T (apply_sub sigma1 t1) (apply_sub sigma2 t2).
Proof.
  induction 1; intros sigma1 sigma2 Hsub; simpl.
  - apply howe_var with (T := T).
    + unfold open_bisim in H0. apply H0 with (sigma1 := sigma1) (sigma2 := sigma2).
      * intro x. exact Hsub x T H.
      * rewrite ctx_lookup_nth in H. exact H.
    + rewrite ctx_lookup_nth in H. simpl. rewrite nth_error_nil in H. discriminate H.
  - apply howe_lam with (t1' := apply_sub (up_sub sigma1) t1').
    + apply IHhowe. intro x; destruct x; intro A0 Hnth; simpl.
      * apply howe_refl. apply ty_var. simpl in Hnth. inversion Hnth; subst. reflexivity.
      * apply Hsub. exact Hnth.
    + unfold open_bisim in H0. apply H0 with (sigma1 := sigma1) (sigma2 := sigma2).
      intro x. exact Hsub x (TArr A B) H.
    + (* The open_bisim condition requires a specific type... the howe_lam constructor's second argument is open_bisim at TArr A B. We need to show open_bisim [] (TArr A B) (apply_sub sigma1 (tLam A t1')) (apply_sub sigma2 t2). But the conclusion has howe [] (TArr A B) (apply_sub sigma1 (tLam A t1)) (apply_sub sigma2 t2). The t1' is the "expansion" from the howe derivation. *)
      (* Actually, the howe_lam constructor uses open_bisim G (TArr A B) (tLam A t1') t2, and we need open_bisim [] (TArr A B) (apply_sub sigma1 (tLam A t1')) (apply_sub sigma2 t2). *)
      (* But the antecedent has open_bisim G ... which we get from H0. We can apply H0 with the same sigma1, sigma2 because G is empty... wait, G is not empty, it's the original context. H0 gives open_bisim with respect to the original G. We need it with respect to the empty context. *)
      (* The way through: open_bisim is by definition equivariant under substitution. Specifically, if open_bisim G T a b then for sigma1 sigma2 that are pointwise howe-related (or bisimilar), apply_sub sigma1 a and apply_sub sigma2 b are also howe-related (or bisimilar). This is the KEY property of the Howe closure. *)
      (* In fact, the howe constructor for tLam requires open_bisim at G. We need open_bisim at [] for the substituted terms. How do we bridge? *)
      
      (* Looking at the howe_lam constructor:
         howe (A::G) B t1 t1' -> open_bisim G (TArr A B) (tLam A t1') t2 -> howe G (TArr A B) (tLam A t1) t2
         
         We want: howe [] (TArr A B) (apply_sub sigma1 (tLam A t1)) (apply_sub sigma2 t2)
         
         The LHS: apply_sub sigma1 (tLam A t1) = tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub sigma1) t1)
         The RHS: apply_sub sigma2 t2
         
         The first premise gives: howe [] B (apply_sub (up_sub sigma1) t1) (apply_sub (up_sub sigma2) t1')
         (by IHhowe with sigma1 := up_sub sigma1, sigma2 := up_sub sigma2)
         
         The open_bisim premise gives: open_bisim G (TArr A B) (tLam A t1') t2
         By definition of open_bisim: for sigma1', sigma2' bisim at G, bisimilar (TArr A B) (apply_sub sigma1' (tLam A t1')) (apply_sub sigma2' t2)
         With sigma1'=sigma1, sigma2'=sigma2: bisimilar (TArr A B) (tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub sigma1) t1')) (apply_sub sigma2 t2)
         
         Now we need to combine: howe [] B (apply_sub (up_sub sigma1) t1) (apply_sub (up_sub sigma2) t1')
         with: bisimilar (TArr A B) (tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub sigma1) t1')) (apply_sub sigma2 t2)
         to get: howe [] (TArr A B) (tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub sigma1) t1)) (apply_sub sigma2 t2)
         
         The howe_lam constructor requires: 
         (1) howe [] B (apply_sub (up_sub sigma1) t1) t1'' for some t1''
         (2) open_bisim [] (TArr A B) (tLam A t1'') (apply_sub sigma2 t2)
         
         We can set t1'' := apply_sub (up_sub sigma2) t1' and use bisimilarity for (2)
         
         But open_bisim requires a bisimilar of the substituted lambdas. We have bisimilar from the premise.
         And bisimilar implies open_bisim at empty context? Not in general, but open_bisim at [] is essentially the same as bisimilar (since the context is empty, there are no free variables, and the substitution condition is vacuous).
         
         Actually, open_bisim [] T a b means: for all sigma1 sigma2, bisimilar T (apply_sub sigma1 a) (apply_sub sigma2 b). If a and b are closed (which they are since G=[]), then apply_sub is the identity, so this is just bisimilar T a b.
         
         So we need to show: open_bisim [] (TArr A B) (tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub sigma2) t1')) (apply_sub sigma2 t2).
         This follows from: bisimilar (TArr A B) (tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub sigma2) t1')) (apply_sub sigma2 t2) (by the open_bisim premise with sigma1:=sigma2, sigma2:=sigma2).
         Wait, the premise has open_bisim G ..., not open_bisim [] .... Hmm.*)
  Abort.

Lemma howe_substitutive_neg : ~ (forall G T t1 t2, howe G T t1 t2 -> forall sigma1 sigma2, (forall x A, nth_error G x = Some A -> howe [] A (sigma1 x) (sigma2 x)) -> howe [] T (apply_sub sigma1 t1) (apply_sub sigma2 t2)).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_is_bisimulation : is_bisimulation (fun T t1 t2 => howe [] T t1 t2).
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma howe_is_bisimulation_neg : ~ (is_bisimulation (fun T t1 t2 => howe [] T t1 t2)).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_implies_bisimilar : forall T t1 t2,
  howe [] T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hh.
  exists (fun T t1 t2 => howe [] T t1 t2).
  split; [exact howe_is_bisimulation | exact Hh].
Qed.

Lemma bisim_congruence : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 ->
  forall C T', (forall s, has_type [] s T -> has_type [] (plug C s) T') ->
  bisimilar T' (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma bisim_congruence_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2, bisimilar T t1 t2 -> forall C T', (forall s, has_type [] s T -> has_type [] (plug C s) T') -> bisimilar T' (plug C t1) (plug C t2)).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma bisim_adequate : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> (terminates t1 <-> terminates t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [HR Hrel]].
  destruct (HR _ _ _ Hrel) as [_ [_ [Hfwd Hbwd]]].
  split.
  - intros [v1 Hv1]. destruct (Hfwd v1 Hv1) as [v2 [Hv2 _]]. exists v2; auto.
  - intros [v2 Hv2]. destruct (Hbwd v2 Hv2) as [v1 [Hv1 _]]. exists v1; auto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hbis.
  assert (Ht1 : has_type [] t1 T).
  { destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hrel]]; exact (proj1 (HR _ _ _ Hrel)). }
  assert (Ht2 : has_type [] t2 T).
  { destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hrel]]; exact (proj1 (proj2 (HR _ _ _ Hrel))). }
  split; [auto | split; [auto |]].
  intros C HC.
  apply bisim_adequate.
  apply bisim_congruence with T; auto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv : forall t v T,
  has_type [] t T -> eval t v ->
  ctx_equiv T t v.
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv_neg : ~ (forall t v T, has_type [] t T -> eval t v -> ctx_equiv T t v).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_substitutive : forall G T t1 t2,

Proof. Admitted.


(* THE main lemma: Howe closure at closed terms is a bisimulation *)
Lemma howe_is_bisimulation : is_bisimulation (fun T t1 t2 => howe [] T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_is_bisimulation_neg : ~ (is_bisimulation (fun T t1 t2 => howe [] T t1 t2)).
Proof. Admitted.


(* Therefore bisimilarity contains the Howe closure *)
Lemma howe_implies_bisimilar : forall T t1 t2,
  howe [] T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hh.
  exists (fun T t1 t2 => howe [] T t1 t2).
  split; [exact howe_is_bisimulation | exact Hh].
Qed.

(* Bisimilarity is a congruence: preserved by all contexts *)
Lemma bisim_congruence : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 ->
  forall C T', (forall s, has_type [] s T -> has_type [] (plug C s) T') ->
  bisimilar T' (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma bisim_congruence_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2, bisimilar T t1 t2 -> forall C T', (forall s, has_type [] s T -> has_type [] (plug C s) T') -> bisimilar T' (plug C t1) (plug C t2)).
Proof. Admitted.


(* Adequacy: bisimilar at TNat implies co-termination *)
Lemma bisim_adequate : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> (terminates t1 <-> terminates t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [HR Hrel]].
  destruct (HR _ _ _ Hrel) as [_ [_ [Hfwd Hbwd]]].
  split.
  - intros [v1 Hv1]. destruct (Hfwd v1 Hv1) as [v2 [Hv2 _]]. exists v2; auto.
  - intros [v2 Hv2]. destruct (Hbwd v2 Hv2) as [v1 [Hv1 _]]. exists v1; auto.
Qed.

(* SOUNDNESS via Howe's method *)
Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hbis.
  assert (Ht1 : has_type [] t1 T).
  { destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hrel]]; exact (proj1 (HR _ _ _ Hrel)). }
  assert (Ht2 : has_type [] t2 T).
  { destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hrel]]; exact (proj1 (proj2 (HR _ _ _ Hrel))). }
  split; [auto | split; [auto |]].
  intros C HC.
  apply bisim_adequate.
  apply bisim_congruence with T; auto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

(* Remove now-unnecessary eval_ctx_equiv dependency from bisim_complete *)

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv : forall t v T,
  has_type [] t T -> eval t v ->
  ctx_equiv T t v.
Proof.
  intros t v T Hty Hev.
  apply bisim_sound.
  (* Construct a Howe derivation relating t and v *)
Admitted.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv_neg : ~ (forall t v T, has_type [] t T -> eval t v -> ctx_equiv T t v).
Proof. Admitted.

(* Helper lemmas to be inserted before open_bisim_refl *)
Lemma apply_sub_ext : forall t sigma1 sigma2,
  (forall x, sigma1 x = sigma2 x) -> apply_sub sigma1 t = apply_sub sigma2 t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros sigma1 sigma2 Heq; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - apply IHt. intro x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub. f_equal. apply Heq.
  - apply IHt3. intro x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub. f_equal. apply Heq.
  - apply IHt. intro x. destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold up_sub. f_equal. apply Heq.
Qed.

Lemma rename_up_ren : forall xi t,
  rename xi t = apply_sub (fun x => tVar (xi x)) t.
Proof.
  intros xi t. revert xi. induction t; intros xi; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt3 (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma rename_comp : forall a b t,
  rename a (rename b t) = rename (fun x => a (b x)) t.
Proof.
  intros a b t. revert a b. induction t; intros a b; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (a x') end) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (b x') end)).
    rewrite !rename_up_ren. apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt3 (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (a x') end) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (b x') end)).
    rewrite !rename_up_ren. apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (a x') end) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (b x') end)).
    rewrite !rename_up_ren. apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma rename_subst : forall xi sigma t,
  rename xi (apply_sub sigma t) = apply_sub (fun x => rename xi (sigma x)) t.
Proof.
  intros xi sigma t. revert xi sigma. induction t; intros r s; simpl; auto.
  - f_equal. rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (r x') end) (up_sub s)).
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite !rename_comp. rewrite !rename_up_ren.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro y; destruct y; reflexivity.
  - f_equal; auto.
  - f_equal. apply IHt.
  - f_equal. apply IHt.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2 |].
    rewrite (IHt3 (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (r x') end) (up_sub s)).
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite !rename_comp. rewrite !rename_up_ren.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro y; destruct y; reflexivity.
  - f_equal. rewrite (IHt (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (r x') end) (up_sub s)).
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite !rename_comp. rewrite !rename_up_ren.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro y; destruct y; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_id : forall t, apply_sub ids t = t.
Proof.
  assert (forall x, up_sub ids x = ids x) as Hup
    by (intro x; destruct x; reflexivity).
  induction t; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_ext t (up_sub ids) ids Hup). apply IHt.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_ext t3 (up_sub ids) ids Hup). apply IHt3.
  - rewrite (apply_sub_ext t (up_sub ids) ids Hup). apply IHt.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_rename_lem : forall sigma xi t,
  apply_sub sigma (rename xi t) = apply_sub (fun x => sigma (xi x)) t.
Proof.
  intros sigma xi t. revert sigma xi. induction t; intros sigma xi; simpl; auto; f_equal; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt (up_sub sigma) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt3 (up_sub sigma) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt (up_sub sigma) (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x' => S (xi x') end)). apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_shift1 : forall u t, subst0 u (shift1 t) = t.
Proof.
  intros u t. unfold subst0.
  rewrite apply_sub_rename_lem with (xi := Nat.add 1).
  rewrite <- (apply_sub_id t) at 2.
  apply apply_sub_ext. intro x. unfold ids. destruct x; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma apply_sub_comp : forall sigma1 sigma2 t,
  apply_sub sigma1 (apply_sub sigma2 t) = apply_sub (fun x => apply_sub sigma1 (sigma2 x)) t.
Proof.
  intros sigma1 sigma2 t. revert sigma1 sigma2. induction t; intros s1 s2; simpl; auto.
  - rewrite (IHt (up_sub s1) (up_sub s2)). f_equal.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite apply_sub_rename_lem. rewrite (rename_subst (Nat.add 1) s1 (s2 x)). reflexivity.
  - f_equal; auto.
  - f_equal. apply IHt.
  - f_equal. apply IHt.
  - f_equal; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2 |].
    rewrite (IHt3 (up_sub s1) (up_sub s2)).
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite apply_sub_rename_lem. rewrite (rename_subst (Nat.add 1) s1 (s2 x)). reflexivity.
  - rewrite (IHt (up_sub s1) (up_sub s2)). f_equal.
    apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
    unfold shift1. rewrite apply_sub_rename_lem. rewrite (rename_subst (Nat.add 1) s1 (s2 x)). reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_up_sub : forall u sigma t,
  subst0 u (apply_sub (up_sub sigma) t) = apply_sub (scons u sigma) t.
Proof.
  intros u sigma t. unfold subst0.
  rewrite apply_sub_comp with (sigma1 := scons u ids) (sigma2 := up_sub sigma).
  apply apply_sub_ext. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto.
  change (apply_sub (scons u ids) (shift1 (sigma x))) with (subst0 u (shift1 (sigma x))).
  apply subst0_shift1.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hbis.
  assert (Ht1 : has_type [] t1 T).

  assert (Ht2 : has_type [] t2 T).
  { destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hrel]]; exact (proj1 (proj2 (HR _ _ _ Hrel))). }
  split; [auto | split; [auto |]].
  intros C HC.
  apply bisim_adequate.
  apply bisim_congruence with T; auto.
Qed.

(* SOUNDNESS via Howe's method *)
Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hbis.
  assert (Ht1 : has_type [] t1 T).
  { destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hrel]]; exact (proj1 (HR _ _ _ Hrel)). }
  assert (Ht2 : has_type [] t2 T).
  { destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hrel]]; exact (proj1 (proj2 (HR _ _ _ Hrel))). }
  split; [auto | split; [auto |]].
  intros C HC.
  apply bisim_adequate.
  apply bisim_congruence with T; auto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

(* Remove now-unnecessary eval_ctx_equiv dependency from bisim_complete *)

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv : forall t v T,
  has_type [] t T -> eval t v ->
  ctx_equiv T t v.
Proof.
  intros t v T Hty Hev.
  apply bisim_sound.
  apply howe_implies_bisimilar.
  (* Construct a Howe derivation relating t and v *)
  admit.
Admitted.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv_neg : ~ (forall t v T, has_type [] t T -> eval t v -> ctx_equiv T t v).
Proof. Admitted.


Lemma ctx_equiv_refl : forall T t, has_type [] t T -> ctx_equiv T t t.
Proof. intros T t Ht. unfold ctx_equiv. split; [auto|split;[auto|]]. intros C HC. tauto. Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_trans : forall T t1 t2 t3,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t2 t3 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t3.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 t3 [H1a [H1b H1c]] [H2a [H2b H2c]].
  split; [auto|split;[auto|]]. intros C HC. split; intro Ht.
  - apply H2c; auto. apply H1c; auto.
  - apply H1c; auto. apply H2c; auto.
Qed.

Lemma subst0_up_sub : forall u sigma t,
  subst0 u (apply_sub (up_sub sigma) t) = apply_sub (scons u sigma) t.
Proof.

Lemma subst0_up_sub : forall u sigma t,
  subst0 u (apply_sub (up_sub sigma) t) = apply_sub (scons u sigma) t.
Proof.
  intros u sigma t. unfold subst0.
  rewrite apply_sub_comp with (sigma1 := scons u ids) (sigma2 := up_sub sigma).

  apply subst0_shift1.
Qed.

Lemma open_bisim_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t.
Proof.
Admitted.

Lemma open_bisim_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.


Lemma howe_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> howe G T t t.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> howe G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.


Lemma howe_substitutive : forall G T t1 t2,
  howe G T t1 t2 ->
  forall sigma1 sigma2,
    (forall x A, nth_error G x = Some A -> howe [] A (sigma1 x) (sigma2 x)) ->
    howe [] T (apply_sub sigma1 t1) (apply_sub sigma2 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_substitutive_neg : ~ (forall G T t1 t2, howe G T t1 t2 -> forall sigma1 sigma2, (forall x A, nth_error G x = Some A -> howe [] A (sigma1 x) (sigma2 x)) -> howe [] T (apply_sub sigma1 t1) (apply_sub sigma2 t2)).
Proof. Admitted.


(* THE main lemma: Howe closure at closed terms is a bisimulation *)
Lemma howe_is_bisimulation : is_bisimulation (fun T t1 t2 => howe [] T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma howe_is_bisimulation_neg : ~ (is_bisimulation (fun T t1 t2 => howe [] T t1 t2)).
Proof. Admitted.


(* Therefore bisimilarity contains the Howe closure *)
Lemma howe_implies_bisimilar : forall T t1 t2,
  howe [] T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hh.
  exists (fun T t1 t2 => howe [] T t1 t2).
  split; [exact howe_is_bisimulation | exact Hh].
Qed.

(* Bisimilarity is a congruence: preserved by all contexts *)
Lemma bisim_congruence : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 ->
  forall C T', (forall s, has_type [] s T -> has_type [] (plug C s) T') ->
  bisimilar T' (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma bisim_congruence_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2, bisimilar T t1 t2 -> forall C T', (forall s, has_type [] s T -> has_type [] (plug C s) T') -> bisimilar T' (plug C t1) (plug C t2)).
Proof. Admitted.


(* Adequacy: bisimilar at TNat implies co-termination *)
Lemma bisim_adequate : forall t1 t2,
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> (terminates t1 <-> terminates t2).
Proof.
  intros t1 t2 [R [HR Hrel]].
  destruct (HR _ _ _ Hrel) as [_ [_ [Hfwd Hbwd]]].
  split.
  - intros [v1 Hv1]. destruct (Hfwd v1 Hv1) as [v2 [Hv2 _]]. exists v2; auto.
  - intros [v2 Hv2]. destruct (Hbwd v2 Hv2) as [v1 [Hv1 _]]. exists v1; auto.
Qed.

Lemma howe_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> howe G T t t.
Proof.
  induction 1.
  - apply howe_var; [exact H | apply open_bisim_refl; constructor; exact H].

  - apply howe_zero. apply open_bisim_refl. constructor.
  - apply howe_succ with (t1' := t); [apply IHhas_type | apply open_bisim_refl; constructor; auto].
  - apply howe_pred with (t1' := t); [apply IHhas_type | apply open_bisim_refl; constructor; auto].

    [apply IHhas_type1 | apply IHhas_type2 | apply IHhas_type3 | apply open_bisim_refl; econstructor; eauto].
  - apply howe_fix with (t1' := t); [apply IHhas_type | apply open_bisim_refl; econstructor; eauto].
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma eval_ctx_equiv : forall t v T,
  has_type [] t T -> eval t v ->
  ctx_equiv T t v.
Proof.
  intros t v T Hty Hev.
  apply bisim_sound.
  exists (fun T' x y => (x = t /\ y = v /\ T' = T) \/ (x = y /\ has_type [] x T')).
  split.
  { split; [| split].
    - left. auto.
    - unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' x y Hr.
      destruct Hr as [[? [? ?]] | [Heq Hty']]; subst.
      + assert (Hvty : has_type [] v T) by (eapply preservation; eauto).
        split; [auto | split; [auto |]].
        destruct T as [|A B].
        * split; intros v1 Hev1; apply (eval_det _ _ Hev) in Hev1; subst.
          exists v; split; [apply eval_val; eapply eval_value; eauto |]; auto.
          exists v; split; [|auto]. apply eval_val. eapply eval_value; eauto.
        * split; intros v1 Hev1; apply (eval_det _ _ Hev) in Hev1; subst.
          exists v; split; [apply eval_val; eapply eval_value; eauto |].
          intros u Hu. right. split; [| eapply ty_app; [eapply preservation; eauto | auto]].
          (* Need bisimilar for the applications... we don't have it! *)
          admit.
          exists v; split; [apply eval_val; eapply eval_value; eauto |].
          intros u Hu. right. split; [| eapply ty_app; [eapply preservation; eauto | auto]].
      + split; [exact Hty' | split; [exact Hty' |]].
        destruct T' as [|A B].
        * split; intros v1 Hev1; exists v1; auto.
        * split; intros v1 Hev1; exists v1; split; auto.
          intros u Hu. right. split; [| eapply ty_app; [eapply preservation; eauto | auto]].
          (* Problem: for arrow types, the identity bisimulation fails because we need bisimilar of the applications! *)
  }
Abort.

Lemma bisimilar_open_bisim_nil : forall T a b, has_type [] a T -> has_type [] b T -> bisimilar T a b -> open_bisim [] T a b.
Proof.
  intros T a b Hta Htb Hbis. unfold open_bisim.
  intros sigma1 sigma2 Hnil.
  rewrite (closed_sub_invariant a T Hta sigma1).
  rewrite (closed_sub_invariant b T Htb sigma2).
  exact Hbis.
Qed.

Lemma open_bisim_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t.
Proof.
  induction 1; unfold open_bisim; intros s1 s2 Hrel; simpl.
  - apply Hrel. exact H.
  - set (b1 := apply_sub (up_sub s1) t).
    set (b2 := apply_sub (up_sub s2) t).
    assert (Happ : forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisimilar B (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2)).
    { intros u Hu. unfold b1, b2. rewrite !(subst0_up_sub u).
      apply (IHhas_type (scons u s1) (scons u s2)).
      intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl.
      - inversion Hnth; subst. apply bisim_refl. exact Hu.
      - apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
    assert (HtyL : has_type [] (tLam A b1) (TArr A B)).
    { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto. intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }

Lemma bisimilar_open_bisim_nil : forall T a b, has_type [] a T -> has_type [] b T -> bisimilar T a b -> open_bisim [] T a b.
Proof.
  intros T a b Hta Htb Hbis. unfold open_bisim.
  intros sigma1 sigma2 Hnil.
  rewrite (closed_sub_invariant a T Hta sigma1).
  rewrite (closed_sub_invariant b T Htb sigma2).
  exact Hbis.
Qed.

Lemma open_bisim_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t.
Proof.
  induction 1 as [G x T Hx | G A B t Ht IH | G t1 t2 A B Ht1 IH1 Ht2 IH2 | | G t Ht IH | G t Ht IH | G s tz ts A Hs IHs Htz IHtz Hts IHts | G A t Ht IH];
    unfold open_bisim; intros s1 s2 Hrel; simpl.
  - (* ty_var *) apply Hrel. exact Hx.
  - (* ty_lam *)
    set (b1 := apply_sub (up_sub s1) t).
    set (b2 := apply_sub (up_sub s2) t).
    assert (Happ : forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisimilar B (tApp (tLam A b1) u) (tApp (tLam A b2) u)).
    { intros u Hu.
      assert (Hsub : bisimilar B (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2)).
      { unfold b1, b2. rewrite !(subst0_up_sub u). apply (IH (scons u s1) (scons u s2)).
        intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl.
        - inversion Hnth; subst. apply bisim_refl. exact Hu.
        - apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
      exists (fun T' x y =>
        (x = tApp (tLam A b1) u /\ y = tApp (tLam A b2) u /\ T' = B) \/
        (x = subst0 u b1 /\ y = subst0 u b2 /\ T' = B) \/
        bisimilar T' x y).
      split. 2: { left. auto. }
      unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' x y Hr.
      destruct Hr as [[? [? ?]] | [[? [? ?]] | Hbis]]; subst.
      + assert (HtyL : has_type [] (tApp (tLam A b1) u) B).
        { eapply ty_app; [eapply apply_sub_typing; [exact Ht | |]; [| exact Hu] | exact Hu].
          intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. } 
        assert (HtyR : has_type [] (tApp (tLam A b2) u) B).
        { eapply ty_app; [eapply apply_sub_typing; [exact Ht | |]; [| exact Hu] | exact Hu].
          intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. }
        split; [exact HtyL | split; [exact HtyR |]].
        destruct B as [|B1 B2].
        * split; intros v Hev; apply app_eval_inv in Hev;
            destruct Hev as [A' [bdy [vt [Hf [Harg Hinner]]]]];
            apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst;
            [| apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst].
          -- destruct Hsub as [R [HR Hr']]. destruct (HR TNat (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2) Hr') as [_ [_ [Hfw _]]].
             destruct (Hfw (subst0 u b1) (eval_val (eval_value _ _ (eval_app (tLam A b1) u (subst0 u b1) (eval_val (v_lam A b1)) Harg Hinner)))) as [v2 [Hev2 Heq]].
             exists (tApp (tLam A b2) u). split. { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. admit. }
             admit.
          -- destruct Hsub as [R [HR Hr']]. destruct (HR TNat (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2) Hr') as [_ [_ [_ Hbw]]].
             destruct (Hbw (subst0 u b2) (eval_val (eval_value _ _ (eval_app (tLam A b2) u (subst0 u b2) (eval_val (v_lam A b2)) Harg Hinner)))) as [v1 [Hev1 Heq]].
             exists (tApp (tLam A b1) u). split. { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. admit. }
             admit.
        * split; intros v Hev; apply app_eval_inv in Hev;
            destruct Hev as [A' [bdy [vt [Hf [Harg Hinner]]]]];
            apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst;
            [| apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst].
          -- destruct Hsub as [R [HR Hr']]. destruct (HR (TArr B1 B2) (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2) Hr') as [_ [_ [Hfw _]]].
             destruct (Hfw (subst0 u b1) (eval_val (eval_value _ _ (eval_app (tLam A b1) u (subst0 u b1) (eval_val (v_lam A b1)) Harg Hinner)))) as [v2 [Hev2 Hforall]].
             exists (tApp (tLam A b2) u). split. { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. admit. }
             intros u' Hu'. right. right. apply (Hforall u' Hu').
          -- destruct Hsub as [R [HR Hr']]. destruct (HR (TArr B1 B2) (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2) Hr') as [_ [_ [_ Hbw]]].
             destruct (Hbw (subst0 u b2) (eval_val (eval_value _ _ (eval_app (tLam A b2) u (subst0 u b2) (eval_val (v_lam A b2)) Harg Hinner)))) as [v1 [Hev1 Hforall]].
             exists (tApp (tLam A b1) u). split. { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. admit. }
             intros u' Hu'. right. right. apply (Hforall u' Hu').
      + (* subst0 case - skip for now, use bisimilar fallback *)
        destruct Hsub as [R [HR Hr']].
        destruct (HR B (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2) Hr') as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hc]].
        split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hc]].
      + (* bisimilar fallback *)
        destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hr']].
        destruct (HR T' x y Hr') as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hc]].
        split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hc]]. }
    exists (fun T' x y =>
      bisimilar T' x y \/
      (x = tLam A b1 /\ y = tLam A b2 /\ T' = TArr A B)).
    split. 2: { right. auto. }
    unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' x y Hr.
    destruct Hr as [Hbis | [? [? ?]]]; subst.
    + destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hr']].
      destruct (HR T' x y Hr') as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hc]].
      split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hc]].
    + assert (HtyL : has_type [] (tLam A b1) (TArr A B)).
      { eapply apply_sub_typing; [exact Ht | |]; intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto; apply Hrel. }
      assert (HtyR : has_type [] (tLam A b2) (TArr A B)).
      { eapply apply_sub_typing; [exact Ht | |]; intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto; apply Hrel. }
      split; [exact HtyL | split; [exact HtyR |]].
      split; intros v Hev; apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A _)) in Hev; subst.
      * exists (tLam A b2). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
        intros u Hu. left. apply Happ. exact Hu.
      * exists (tLam A b1). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
        intros u Hu. left. apply Happ. exact Hu.
Admitted. (* open_bisim_refl complete modulo admits in the tApp sub-bisimulation *)

Lemma open_bisim_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.
ENDCOQ

Lemma bisimilar_via_eval : forall T a b,
  has_type [] a T -> has_type [] b T ->
  (exists v1 v2, eval a v1 /\ eval b v2 /\ bisimilar T v1 v2) ->
  bisimilar T a b.
Proof.
  intros T a b Hta Htb [v1 [v2 [Heva [Hevb Hbis]]]].
  exists (fun T' x y =>
    (exists w1 w2, eval x w1 /\ eval y w2 /\ bisimilar T' w1 w2)
    \/ (x = y /\ has_type [] x T')).
  split; [| left; exists v1, v2; auto].
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' x y Hr.
  destruct Hr as [[w1 [w2 [Hevx [Hevy Hb]]]] | [Heq Ht]]; subst.
  - eapply preservation in Hevx as Htx; eauto.
    eapply preservation in Hevy as Hty; eauto.
    split; [exact Htx | split; [exact Hty |]].
    destruct T'.
    + split; intros vx Hevx'; apply (eval_det _ _ Hevx) in Hevx'; subst.
      destruct Hb as [R [HR Hr']]. destruct (HR TNat w1 w2 Hr') as [_ [_ [Hfw Hbw]]].
      destruct (Hfw w1 (eval_val (eval_value _ _ Hevx))) as [w2' [Hevw2' Heq]].
      exists w2'. split. { apply (eval_det _ _ Hevy) in Hevw2'. exact Hevw2'. }
      exact Heq.
      destruct (Hbw w2 (eval_val (eval_value _ _ Hevy))) as [w1' [Hevw1' Heq]].
      exists w1'. split. { apply (eval_det _ _ Hevx) in Hevw1'. exact Hevw1'. }
      exact Heq.
    + destruct Hb as [R [HR Hr']]. destruct (HR (TArr T'1 T'2) w1 w2 Hr') as [_ [_ [Hfw Hbw]]].
      split; intros vx Hevx'; apply (eval_det _ _ Hevx) in Hevx'; subst.
      * destruct (Hfw w1 (eval_val (eval_value _ _ Hevx))) as [w2' [Hevw2' Hrlam]].
        exists w2'. split. { apply (eval_det _ _ Hevy) in Hevw2'. exact Hevw2'. }
        intros u Hu.
        assert (Hew1 : eval (tApp w1 u) (tApp w1 u)) by (apply eval_val; constructor).
        assert (Hew2 : eval (tApp w2' u) (tApp w2' u)) by (apply eval_val; constructor).
        left. exists (tApp w1 u), (tApp w2' u). split; [exact Hew1 | split; [exact Hew2 |]].
        apply Hrlam. exact Hu.
      * destruct (Hbw w2 (eval_val (eval_value _ _ Hevy))) as [w1' [Hevw1' Hrlam]].
        exists w1'. split. { apply (eval_det _ _ Hevx) in Hevw1'. exact Hevw1'. }
        intros u Hu.
        assert (Hew1 : eval (tApp w1' u) (tApp w1' u)) by (apply eval_val; constructor).
        assert (Hew2 : eval (tApp w2 u) (tApp w2 u)) by (apply eval_val; constructor).
        left. exists (tApp w1' u), (tApp w2 u). split; [exact Hew1 | split; [exact Hew2 |]].
        apply Hrlam. exact Hu.
  - split; [exact Ht | split; [exact Ht |]].
    destruct T'.
    + split; intros v1 Hev; exists v1; auto.
    + split; intros v1 Hev; exists v1; split; auto.
      intros u Hu. right. split; [| eapply ty_app; [eapply preservation; eauto | auto]].
Qed.

Lemma open_bisim_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t.
Proof.
  induction 1; unfold open_bisim; intros s1 s2 Hrel; simpl.
  - apply Hrel. exact H.
  - set (b1 := apply_sub (up_sub s1) t).
    set (b2 := apply_sub (up_sub s2) t).
    assert (Hsub : forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisimilar B (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2)).
    { intros u Hu. unfold b1, b2. rewrite !(subst0_up_sub u).
      apply (IHhas_type (scons u s1) (scons u s2)).
      intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl.
      - inversion Hnth; subst. apply bisim_refl. exact Hu.
      - apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
    assert (HtyL : has_type [] (tLam A b1) (TArr A B)).
    { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. }
    assert (HtyR : has_type [] (tLam A b2) (TArr A B)).
    { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. }
    exists (fun T' x y =>
      bisimilar T' x y \/
      (x = tLam A b1 /\ y = tLam A b2 /\ T' = TArr A B)).
    split; [| right; auto].
    unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' x y Hr.
    destruct Hr as [Hbis | [? [? ?]]]; subst.
    + destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hr']].
      destruct (HR T' x y Hr') as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hc]].
      split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hc]].
    + split; [exact HtyL | split; [exact HtyR |]].
      split; intros v Hev; apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A _)) in Hev; subst.
      * exists (tLam A b2). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
        intros u Hu. left. apply bisimilar_via_eval.
        { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyL | exact Hu]. }
        { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyR | exact Hu]. }
        exists (subst0 u b1), (subst0 u b2). split; [| split; [| apply Hsub; exact Hu]].
        { apply eval_val. constructor. }
        { apply eval_val. constructor. }
      * exists (tLam A b1). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
        intros u Hu. left. apply bisimilar_via_eval.
        { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyL | exact Hu]. }
        { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyR | exact Hu]. }
        exists (subst0 u b1), (subst0 u b2). split; [| split; [| apply Hsub; exact Hu]].
        { apply eval_val. constructor. }
        { apply eval_val. constructor. }
  - apply bisimilar_via_eval.
    { eapply ty_app; [apply (IHhas_type1 s1 s2 Hrel) | apply (IHhas_type2 s1 s2 Hrel)]. }
    { eapply ty_app; [apply (IHhas_type1 s1 s2 Hrel) | apply (IHhas_type2 s1 s2 Hrel)]. }
    exists (tApp (apply_sub s1 t1) (apply_sub s1 t2)), (tApp (apply_sub s2 t1) (apply_sub s2 t2)).
    split; [apply eval_val; constructor | split; [apply eval_val; constructor |]].
    apply (IHhas_type1 s1 s2 Hrel).
    (* This is wrong - we need bisimilar at type B, not at TArr *)
    (* Actually: apply_sub s1 t1 and apply_sub s2 t1 are bisimilar at TArr A B *)
    (* And apply_sub s1 t2 and apply_sub s2 t2 are bisimilar at A *)
    (* But tApp (apply_sub s1 t1) (apply_sub s1 t2) has type B *)
    (* The bisimilar we produced above is at TArr A B, not at B *)
    (* We need: bisimilar B (tApp ...) (tApp ...) *)
    (* This is a problem — we can't use IHhas_type1 directly *)
  Abort.

Lemma open_bisim_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma bisimilar_open_bisim_nil : forall T a b, has_type [] a T -> has_type [] b T -> bisimilar T a b -> open_bisim [] T a b.
Proof.
  intros T a b Hta Htb Hbis. unfold open_bisim.
  intros sigma1 sigma2 Hnil.
  rewrite (closed_sub_invariant a T Hta sigma1).
  rewrite (closed_sub_invariant b T Htb sigma2).
  exact Hbis.
Qed.

Lemma open_bisim_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t.
Proof.
  induction 1; unfold open_bisim; intros s1 s2 Hrel; simpl.
  - apply Hrel. exact H.
  - set (b1 := apply_sub (up_sub s1) t).
    set (b2 := apply_sub (up_sub s2) t).
    assert (Happ : forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisimilar B (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2)).
    { intros u Hu. unfold b1, b2. rewrite !(subst0_up_sub u).
      apply (IHhas_type (scons u s1) (scons u s2)).
      intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl.
      - inversion Hnth; subst. apply bisim_refl. exact Hu.
      - apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
    assert (HtyL : has_type [] (tLam A b1) (TArr A B)).
    { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto. intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
    assert (HtyR : has_type [] (tLam A b2) (TArr A B)).
    { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto. intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
    exists (fun T' x y =>
      bisimilar T' x y \/
      (x = tLam A b1 /\ y = tLam A b2 /\ T' = TArr A B) \/
      (exists u, x = tApp (tLam A b1) u /\ y = tApp (tLam A b2) u /\ T' = B /\ has_type [] u A)).
    split.
    { split; [| split].
      - right. left. auto.
      - unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' x y Hr.
        destruct Hr as [Hbis | [[? [? ?]] | [u [? [? [? Hu]]]]]]; subst.
        + destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hr']].
          destruct (HR T' x y Hr') as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hc]].
          split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hc]].
        + split; [exact HtyL | split; [exact HtyR |]].
          split; intros v Hev; apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A _)) in Hev; subst.
          * exists (tLam A b2). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
            intros u0 Hu0. right. right. exists u0. auto.
          * exists (tLam A b1). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
            intros u0 Hu0. left. apply Happ. exact Hu0.
        + assert (HtapL : has_type [] (tApp (tLam A b1) u) B).
          { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyL | exact Hu]. }
          assert (HtapR : has_type [] (tApp (tLam A b2) u) B).
          { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyR | exact Hu]. }
          split; [exact HtapL | split; [exact HtapR |]].
          destruct B as [|B1 B2].
          * split; intros v Hev; apply app_eval_inv in Hev;
              destruct Hev as [A' [bdy [vt [Hf [Harg Hinner]]]]];
              apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst;
              [| apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst].
            -- exists (subst0 u b2). split.
               { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. exact (proj2 (proj2 (Happ u Hu)) (subst0 u b2) Hinner). }
               left. apply Happ. exact Hu.
            -- exists (subst0 u b1). split.
               { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. exact (proj2 (proj2 (proj3 (Happ u Hu))) (subst0 u b1) Hinner). }
               left. apply Happ. exact Hu.
          * split; intros v Hev; apply app_eval_inv in Hev;
              destruct Hev as [A' [bdy [vt [Hf [Harg Hinner]]]]];
              apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst;
              [| apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A' bdy)) in Hf; inversion Hf; subst].
            -- exists (subst0 u b2). split.
               { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. exact (proj2 (proj2 (Happ u Hu)) (subst0 u b2) Hinner). }
               intros u' Hu'. left. apply Happ. exact Hu.
            -- exists (subst0 u b1). split.
               { eapply eval_app; [apply eval_val; constructor | exact Harg |]. exact (proj2 (proj2 (proj3 (Happ u Hu))) (subst0 u b1) Hinner). }
               intros u' Hu'. left. apply Happ. exact Hu.
      }
    - (* ty_app *) Abort.

Lemma open_bisim_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.

input.oldString:
Lemma bisimilar_via_eval : forall T a b,
  has_type [] a T -> has_type [] b T ->
  (exists v1 v2, eval a v1 /\ eval b v2 /\ bisimilar T v1 v2) ->
  bisimilar T a b.
Proof.
  intros T a b Hta Htb [v1 [v2 [Heva [Hevb Hbis]]]].
  exists (fun T' x y =>
    (exists w1 w2, eval x w1 /\ eval y w2 /\ bisimilar T' w1 w2)
    \/ (x = y /\ has_type [] x T')).
  split; [| left; exists v1, v2; auto].
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' x y Hr.
  destruct Hr as [[w1 [w2 [Hevx [Hevy Hb]]]] | [Heq Ht]]; subst.
  - eapply preservation in Hevx as Htx; eauto.
    eapply preservation in Hevy as Hty; eauto.
    split; [exact Htx | split; [exact Hty |]].
    destruct T'.
    + split; intros vx Hevx'; apply (eval_det _ _ Hevx) in Hevx'; subst.
      destruct Hb as [R [HR Hr']]. destruct (HR TNat w1 w2 Hr') as [_ [_ [Hfw Hbw]]].
      destruct (Hfw w1 (eval_val (eval_value _ _ Hevx))) as [w2' [Hevw2' Heq]].
      exists w2'. split. { apply (eval_det _ _ Hevy) in Hevw2'. exact Hevw2'. }
      exact Heq.
      destruct (Hbw w2 (eval_val (eval_value _ _ Hevy))) as [w1' [Hevw1' Heq]].
      exists w1'. split. { apply (eval_det _ _ Hevx) in Hevw1'. exact Hevw1'. }
      exact Heq.
    + destruct Hb as [R [HR Hr']]. destruct (HR (TArr T'1 T'2) w1 w2 Hr') as [_ [_ [Hfw Hbw]]].
      split; intros vx Hevx'; apply (eval_det _ _ Hevx) in Hevx'; subst.
      * destruct (Hfw w1 (eval_val (eval_value _ _ Hevx))) as [w2' [Hevw2' Hrlam]].
        exists w2'. split. { apply (eval_det _ _ Hevy) in Hevw2'. exact Hevw2'. }
        intros u Hu.
        assert (Hew1 : eval (tApp w1 u) (tApp w1 u)) by (apply eval_val; constructor).
        assert (Hew2 : eval (tApp w2' u) (tApp w2' u)) by (apply eval_val; constructor).
        left. exists (tApp w1 u), (tApp w2' u). split; [exact Hew1 | split; [exact Hew2 |]].
        apply Hrlam. exact Hu.
      * destruct (Hbw w2 (eval_val (eval_value _ _ Hevy))) as [w1' [Hevw1' Hrlam]].
        exists w1'. split. { apply (eval_det _ _ Hevx) in Hevw1'. exact Hevw1'. }
        intros u Hu.
        assert (Hew1 : eval (tApp w1' u) (tApp w1' u)) by (apply eval_val; constructor).
        assert (Hew2 : eval (tApp w2 u) (tApp w2 u)) by (apply eval_val; constructor).
        left. exists (tApp w1' u), (tApp w2 u). split; [exact Hew1 | split; [exact Hew2 |]].
        apply Hrlam. exact Hu.
  - split; [exact Ht | split; [exact Ht |]].
    destruct T'.
    + split; intros v1 Hev; exists v1; auto.
    + split; intros v1 Hev; exists v1; split; auto.
      intros u Hu. right. split; [| eapply ty_app; [eapply preservation; eauto | auto]].
Qed.

Lemma open_bisim_refl : forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t.
Proof.
  induction 1; unfold open_bisim; intros s1 s2 Hrel; simpl.
  - apply Hrel. exact H.
  - set (b1 := apply_sub (up_sub s1) t).
    set (b2 := apply_sub (up_sub s2) t).
    assert (Hsub : forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisimilar B (subst0 u b1) (subst0 u b2)).
    { intros u Hu. unfold b1, b2. rewrite !(subst0_up_sub u).
      apply (IHhas_type (scons u s1) (scons u s2)).
      intro x; destruct x; intro T0 Hnth; simpl.
      - inversion Hnth; subst. apply bisim_refl. exact Hu.
      - apply Hrel. exact Hnth. }
    assert (HtyL : has_type [] (tLam A b1) (TArr A B)).
    { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. }
    assert (HtyR : has_type [] (tLam A b2) (TArr A B)).
    { eapply apply_sub_typing; eauto. intro x; destruct x; simpl; auto. apply Hrel. }
    exists (fun T' x y =>
      bisimilar T' x y \/
      (x = tLam A b1 /\ y = tLam A b2 /\ T' = TArr A B)).
    split; [| right; auto].
    unfold is_bisimulation. intros T' x y Hr.
    destruct Hr as [Hbis | [? [? ?]]]; subst.
    + destruct Hbis as [R [HR Hr']].
      destruct (HR T' x y Hr') as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hc]].
      split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hc]].
    + split; [exact HtyL | split; [exact HtyR |]].
      split; intros v Hev; apply (value_eval_self _ (v_lam A _)) in Hev; subst.
      * exists (tLam A b2). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
        intros u Hu. left. apply bisimilar_via_eval.
        { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyL | exact Hu]. }
        { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyR | exact Hu]. }
        exists (subst0 u b1), (subst0 u b2). split; [| split; [| apply Hsub; exact Hu]].
        { apply eval_val. constructor. }
        { apply eval_val. constructor. }
      * exists (tLam A b1). split; [apply eval_val; constructor |].
        intros u Hu. left. apply bisimilar_via_eval.
        { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyL | exact Hu]. }
        { eapply ty_app; [exact HtyR | exact Hu]. }
        exists (subst0 u b1), (subst0 u b2). split; [| split; [| apply Hsub; exact Hu]].
        { apply eval_val. constructor. }
        { apply eval_val. constructor. }
  - apply bisimilar_via_eval.
    { eapply ty_app; [apply (IHhas_type1 s1 s2 Hrel) | apply (IHhas_type2 s1 s2 Hrel)]. }
    { eapply ty_app; [apply (IHhas_type1 s1 s2 Hrel) | apply (IHhas_type2 s1 s2 Hrel)]. }
    exists (tApp (apply_sub s1 t1) (apply_sub s1 t2)), (tApp (apply_sub s2 t1) (apply_sub s2 t2)).
    split; [apply eval_val; constructor | split; [apply eval_val; constructor |]].
    apply (IHhas_type1 s1 s2 Hrel).
    (* This is still wrong - we need bisimilar at B, not at TArr *)
  Abort.

Lemma open_bisim_refl_neg : ~ (forall G T t, has_type G t T -> open_bisim G T t t).
Proof. Admitted.
